channel.title: NDTV News Search Records Found 1000
channel.description: NDTV.com provides the latest information from and in-depth coverage of India and the world. Find breaking news, India news, top stories, elections, politics, business, cricket, movies, lifestyle, health, live TV, videos, photos and more.

item.title: US, India Join Hands To Counter China's Supply Chain Dominance

media:content.media:description: The taskforce's launch reflects a broader strategic calculus

item.description: The US-India Business Council has launched an industry platform aimed at building resilient critical minerals supply chains between the two countries, as Washington and New Delhi accelerate efforts to reduce dependence on China-dominated resource networks.
item.content:encoded: The US-India Business Council has launched an industry platform aimed at building resilient critical minerals supply chains between the two countries, as Washington and New Delhi accelerate efforts to reduce dependence on China-dominated resource networks.

item.title: US-Iran War LIVE Updates: Trump Says Peace Deal To Be Signed On Friday, Tehran Reiterates "Mistrust"

media:content.media:description: US Iran War LIVE Updates

item.description: US-Iran War LIVE Updates: Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesperson Esmaeil Baqaei reportedly denied that a memorandum of understanding would be signed.
item.content:encoded: US-Iran War LIVE Updates: Iranian Foreign Ministry spokesperson Esmaeil Baqaei reportedly denied that a memorandum of understanding would be signed.

item.title: BBC To Layoff 2,000 Staff In A Bid To Cut Down 10% Of Budget

media:content.media:description: Cuts in BBC news are expected to lead to a large number of job losses.

item.description: With over 20,000 staff, the BBC is expected to cut about a tenth of its costs resulting in 2,000 job losses.
item.content:encoded: With over 20,000 staff, the BBC is expected to cut about a tenth of its costs resulting in 2,000 job losses.

item.title: Trump Threatens 100% Tariff On French Wine Over Digital Services Tax Ahead Of G7 Summit

media:content.media:description: The United States is the biggest importing country for French wines and spirits

item.description: France imposed in 2019 a three percent levy on the revenues earned by technology firms -- including American giants such as Facebook, Amazon, Apple and Google parent Alphabet -- within the country's borders.
item.content:encoded: France imposed in 2019 a three percent levy on the revenues earned by technology firms -- including American giants such as Facebook, Amazon, Apple and Google parent Alphabet -- within the country's borders.

item.title: 'Critical Step:' Global Leaders Welcome US-Iran Peace Deal

media:content.media:description: Hours before leaving Washington for G7 Summit, Trump announced an agreement to end the war

item.description: Secretary-General Antonio Guterres welcomed the peace deal as a "critical step towards the peaceful settlement of the conflict."
item.content:encoded: Secretary-General Antonio Guterres welcomed the peace deal as a "critical step towards the peaceful settlement of the conflict."

item.title: Israel's First Reaction On US-Iran Deal Is Not A Good News For Trump's Plan

media:content.media:description: Israel has taken control of areas in Gaza, Lebanon and Syria, amounting to 1,000 square kilometres

item.description: Katz said Israel won't withdraw from Lebanese territory as the interim deal is pending. He said Tel Aviv plans to stay "indefinitely" in lands it holds in Lebanon, as well as Syria and the Gaza Strip.
item.content:encoded: Katz said Israel won't withdraw from Lebanese territory as the interim deal is pending. He said Tel Aviv plans to stay "indefinitely" in lands it holds in Lebanon, as well as Syria and the Gaza Strip.

item.title: India-Bound LNG Tanker Crosses Strait Of Hormuz, To Reach Gujarat On Friday

media:content.media:description: LNG tanker Disha is is expected to reach Dahej Port in Gujarat on June 18.

item.description: Disha could be the first large tanker to cross the strait after the announcement of the ceasefire deal and is heading to Dahej Port in Gujarat.
item.content:encoded: Disha could be the first large tanker to cross the strait after the announcement of the ceasefire deal and is heading to Dahej Port in Gujarat.

item.title: At Trump's Birthday Event, UFC Player Makes Controversial Comment Against Michelle Obama

media:content.media:description: The incident took place during the "Freedom UFC 250" showcase, organised at the White House.

item.description: Following his victory over Derrick Lewis, Hokit was handed a post-fight microphone when he made an unfounded and offensive comment about Michelle Obama.
item.content:encoded: Following his victory over Derrick Lewis, Hokit was handed a post-fight microphone when he made an unfounded and offensive comment about Michelle Obama.

item.title: Israel To Hormuz: Success Of Trump's Iran Deal Hinges On These Points

media:content.media:description: Israel Katz said the Jewish state won't withdraw from land seized in Lebanon

item.description: One of the foremost unanswered questions is regarding the restrictions on Iran's enrichment and what should happen to the stockpile of highly enriched uranium Tehran has now.
item.content:encoded: One of the foremost unanswered questions is regarding the restrictions on Iran's enrichment and what should happen to the stockpile of highly enriched uranium Tehran has now.

item.title: Japanese Royal Family To Adopt Distant Male Relatives To Secure Succession

media:content.media:description: For succession, only three people are in line.

item.description: Japan legislature has advanced a proposal that would allow the imperial family to adopt distant male relatives.
item.content:encoded: Japan legislature has advanced a proposal that would allow the imperial family to adopt distant male relatives.

item.title: Britain Follows Australia, Plans Social Media Ban For Children Under-16

media:content.media:description: Australia was the first country to ban social media for children under 16

item.description: Keir Starmer said on Monday he would introduce sweeping changes to social media regulation to better protect the wellbeing of children when they are online.
item.content:encoded: Keir Starmer said on Monday he would introduce sweeping changes to social media regulation to better protect the wellbeing of children when they are online.

item.title: Peace In Middle East? But Nuclear File Is Real Test Of US-Iran Deal

media:content.media:description: Image generated by AI

item.description: Key challenges remain over Iran's nuclear program, with uncertain compliance and potential for covert enrichment activities.
item.content:encoded: Key challenges remain over Iran's nuclear program, with uncertain compliance and potential for covert enrichment activities.

item.title: Why PM Modi Was Welcomed With Bread And Salt During Slovakia Visit

media:content.media:description: It is a traditional way of showing respect and honour to guests.

item.description: The bread-and-salt ceremony is one of Slovakia's oldest customs and is reserved for honoured guests, including visiting heads of state and dignitaries.
item.content:encoded: The bread-and-salt ceremony is one of Slovakia's oldest customs and is reserved for honoured guests, including visiting heads of state and dignitaries.

item.title: How SpaceX's IPO Made Elon Musk A Trillionaire And Others Billionaires

media:content.media:description: The IPO made thousands of SpaceX employees richer.

item.description: The company's share price rose from $135 to $160.95 on its first trading day, increasing SpaceX's market value to $2.11 trillion.
item.content:encoded: The company's share price rose from $135 to $160.95 on its first trading day, increasing SpaceX's market value to $2.11 trillion.

item.title: Norway Crown Prince's Stepson Found Guilty Of Rape, Gets 4-Year Jail

media:content.media:description: Marius Borg Hoiby, 29, was acquitted on two other counts of rape

item.description: The seven-week trial gripped the Nordic country, detailing Hoiby's drug addiction, self-made videos of sexual encounters and more than 800 electronic messages entered into evidence.
item.content:encoded: The seven-week trial gripped the Nordic country, detailing Hoiby's drug addiction, self-made videos of sexual encounters and more than 800 electronic messages entered into evidence.

item.title: 7.5 Hours Apart, Trump Finalised Iran Deal On His Birthday, But Iran Didn't

media:content.media:description: Trump on Monday morning (local time) announced that the deal with Iran is "complete."

item.description: Iran delayed the finalisation of its memorandum of understanding (MoU) with the US until after midnight local time.
item.content:encoded: Iran delayed the finalisation of its memorandum of understanding (MoU) with the US until after midnight local time.

item.title: JD Vance To Discuss 2028 White House Run With Wife After 2026 Midterms

media:content.media:description: JD Vance said he believes Trump will support whatever decision he makes.

item.description: He said that people often assume he is already planning a presidential campaign, but that is not the case.
item.content:encoded: He said that people often assume he is already planning a presidential campaign, but that is not the case.

item.title: After Years Of Mocking Joe Biden's Age, Trump Turns 80 And He Is "Not Happy"

media:content.media:description: Trump's 80th birthday celebrations have brought renewed attention to questions over his health.

item.description: Trump, who frequently criticised Joe Biden over age, is now facing fresh scrutiny as he enters his ninth decade
item.content:encoded: Trump, who frequently criticised Joe Biden over age, is now facing fresh scrutiny as he enters his ninth decade

item.title: Why Strait Of Hormuz Reopening Won't Instantly Fix Economic Issues

media:content.media:description: The Strait of Hormuz reopening will set into motion the rectification of a disrupted supply chain.

item.description: India is among the world's largest crude importers, and the opening of the Hormuz Strait will allay concerns over oil supplies, lowering freight costs and reducing inflationary pressure.
item.content:encoded: India is among the world's largest crude importers, and the opening of the Hormuz Strait will allay concerns over oil supplies, lowering freight costs and reducing inflationary pressure.

item.title: Iran's $12 Billion Assets Remain Sticking Point In US, Tehran Peace Deal

media:content.media:description: The US had earlier pitched using the assets to compensate future damage caused by Iran during war.

item.description: Iran's Mehr news agency quoted the 14-point memorandum of understanding to state that the US has agreed to release the frozen assets before the start of negotiations.
item.content:encoded: <iframe title="Player" class="head-story__img img__full lazyload" height="300" scrolling=no frameborder=no src="about:blank" data-src="https://www.ndtv.com/video/embed-player/id/1113300/play-via-app-wap?pWidth=100&pHeight=100&embed_type=story&site=classic&autostart=1"> </iframe>Iran's Mehr news agency quoted the 14-point memorandum of understanding to state that the US has agreed to release the frozen assets before the start of negotiations.
